stemHtml: Aircraft has two wing mounted engines, and the thrust asymmetry after an engine failure will lead to a yawing moment. The least ability to oppose the yawing moment created from a failed engine occurs when the CG:

options.a: Is located at the aft limit of the CG range.
options.b: Coincides with the centre of pressure.
options.c: Is located at the forward limit of the CG range.
options.d: Is located at the mid-point, halfway between the forward and aft CG limits.
